title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bata India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bata India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bata India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bata India:
Bata India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India!
